label: Cindervale
description: Cindervale stands as a re-founded bastion-city on the edge of a ruinfield, its broken ancient masonry reinforced with later bastions of blackened brick and riveted iron. A ring of survey markers and license-stones governs entry, recording tolls, quarantine ordinances, and interdictions against liminal breach-zones tied to Ahm’a and Limbo. The civic core is dominated by an oath-hall and archival vaults where lineage claims, charters, and ecclesiastical writs are preserved under sealed custody. Narrow market lanes converge on fortified caravan yards, reflecting a polity shaped by trade insecurity, contested legitimacy, and codified emergency law.
